info.title: Coworking Space Backend API
info.description: API for managing coworking space operations including auth, sessions, subscribers, inventory, sales, expenses, debts, rooms, bookings, courses, follow-up, dashboard, reports, settings, staff, permissions, and login logs.

pageKey.description: Arabic page key, e.g. inside space, subscribers, inventory, snacks, drinks, expenses, debts, rooms, courses, followUp, dashboard, reports, settings, staff, permissions, loginLogs

post.description: Authenticate user and return access + refresh tokens
Exchange refresh token for new access + refresh tokens

get.description: View all currently active (not checked out) sessions

post.description: Start a new session (check-in). For existing visitors, send visitorId. For walk-ins, send name, phone, type.

patch.description: Update session details such as check-in/out time, amount, payment status/method

post.description: End session and create a debt record for unpaid amount

200.description: Session checked out unpaid, debt created

post.description: Add an inventory item order to the active session
Create a new subscriber with subscription details
Renew or extend an existing subscription
Add quantity to existing inventory item

get.description: Get expense breakdown grouped by category within optional date range

post.description: Mark a pending debt as collected

get.description: Check if a time slot conflicts with existing bookings for a room

schema.description: Booking ID to exclude from conflict check (for updates)

get.description: Get list of visitors for follow-up. Use showAll=true to include contacted/opted-out visitors.
Get today's key metrics: revenue, sessions, active subscribers, expenses, pending debts, room bookings
Get daily revenue data for the specified number of days
Export data report for a date range as XLSX
Get current system settings including hourly rate, full day price, company info
Admin only. pageKey values: داخل المساحة, المشتركون, المخزون, السناكس, المشروبات, المصروفات, المديونيات, القاعات, الدورات, المتابعة, الرئيسية, التقارير, الإعدادات, الموظفون, الصلاحيات, سجلات الدخول

patch.description: Admin only. pageKey values: داخل المساحة, المشتركون, المخزون, السناكس, المشروبات, المصروفات, المديونيات, القاعات, الدورات, المتابعة, الرئيسية, التقارير, الإعدادات, الموظفون, الصلاحيات, سجلات الدخول

get.description: Admin only. Paginated login history with optional date filtering.
